scripts.services:install: pip install -e services/ai-inference -e services/angineer-core -e services/sop-core -e services/docs-core -e services/geo-core -e services/engtools -e services/evals-core
scripts.eval:knowledge-rag:retrieval: python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0, str(Path('services/docs-core/src').resolve())); from docs_core.evals.eval_retrieval import main; main()"
scripts.eval:knowledge-rag:answer: python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0, str(Path('services/docs-core/src').resolve())); from docs_core.evals.eval_answer import main; main()"
scripts.eval:knowledge-rag:text2sql: python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0, str(Path('services/docs-core/src').resolve())); from docs_core.evals.eval_text2sql import main; main()"
scripts.eval:knowledge-rag:report: python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0, str(Path('services/docs-core/src').resolve())); from docs_core.evals.eval_reporter import main; main()"
scripts.eval:knowledge-rag: python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0, str(Path('services/docs-core/src').resolve())); from docs_core.evals.eval_retrieval import main; main()" && python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0, str(Path('services/docs-core/src').resolve())); from docs_core.evals.eval_answer import main; main()" && python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0, str(Path('services/docs-core/src').resolve())); from docs_core.evals.eval_text2sql import main; main()"
scripts.eval:list: python -c "from evals_core.storage.result_store import init_db, list_datasets; init_db(); import json; print(json.dumps(list_datasets(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))"
